name: FormLabelComponent
description:
Label to be linked to a form control.

```html
<label fd-form-label for="input-id">Label Text</label>
<input fd-form-control type="text" id="input-id" />
```

inputs.name: allowWrap
inputs.description: Whether to allow the text of the form label to wrap.

inputs.name: colon
inputs.description: Whether label text should be appended with colon.

inputs.name: independent
inputs.description: Whether this label stands alone (self-centering, no end margin).

inputs.name: inlineHelpBodyPlacement
inputs.description:
The placement of the inline help.
It can be one of:
top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end,
right, right-start, right-end, left, left-start, left-end.

inputs.name: inlineHelpContent
inputs.description: Inline help content. Could be just a string or complex template

inputs.name: inlineHelpGlyph
inputs.description: Glyph of icon triggering inline help.

inputs.name: inlineHelpPlacement
inputs.description: If inline help trigger icon should be placed after, or before text.

inputs.name: inlineHelpTriggers
inputs.description: Trigger event names for the inline help.

inputs.name: unitDescription
inputs.description: Whether this label is a unit description (e.g., "kg", "USD").
